allow: Bash(mkdir -p src/data src/components src/layouts src/pages/tools src/pages/move-to src/pages/compare public/images)
Bash(touch src/data/.gitkeep src/components/.gitkeep src/layouts/.gitkeep src/pages/tools/.gitkeep src/pages/move-to/.gitkeep src/pages/compare/.gitkeep public/images/.gitkeep)
Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./src/data/countries.json'\); console.log\('Total countries:', d.length\); d.forEach\(c => console.log\(c.id, '-', c.name\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./src/data/us-cities.json'\); console.log\('Total cities:', d.length\); d.forEach\(\(c,i\) => console.log\(\(i+1\)+'.',c.name+',',c.state,'| costIndex:',c.costIndex,'| rent: $'+c.rentOneBedroomAverage\)\);")
